title: Most AI agents are fake (here's a 10-second test)
summary: Jeff Su argues that most companies falsely label products as AI agents when they perform only classification or basic generation. He proposes a simple test: genuine agents autonomously think and iterate, while non-agentic AI merely outputs classifications, numbers, or generated text without autonomous behavior. He uses Google and Anthropic products to illustrate the distinction.
